transcript.text:
You dip it in stars It's a little unique
[Star-shaped flakes...]
[Stella Pick]
They use fresh frying oil every morning
Bon appetit
Dip it So cool
We would like to make a bet with you
[I can't back out on it]
Free food for life if the video goes over 1.5 million views
[And an even greater bet...]
[An offer you can't refuse]
[Starting now]
Hello everyone
I'm here to eat tteokboki today (spicy rice cake)
These types of tteokboki are very popular now
You dip it in star-shaped flakes A little unique

I'm a tteokboki restaurant owner myself I will have to go try it
[Stella Pick] [Gyeonggi, Anyang-si]
Hello
What? Someone's in there?
-Hello -Hi there
I was so surprised
Nice to meet you
The voice doesn't match the costume
-We'll give you delicious star-flake-dipped tteokboki -Okay, thank you
So cute Look at it
Hello
He's taking it off
These are cute Are they for sale too?
Small ice boxes
We gave them out as an event to our customers
Tissue here too

Apron over here
It's a bag
A bag?
I thought it was an apron
Let's order here
Which one's the best?
Our most popular items are brisket tteokboki, rosé tteokboki, and cheddar cheese tteokboki
Those 3, and...
This one too
Dip in the flakes, right?
Just fried flakes
The texture is great if you eat it with the rice cake
There are different flavors for the flakes as well
Then for cheddar cheese...
Since it already has cheese, we recommend the japaneño flavor
Curry,

Light,
I guess this one is white tteokboki
Cheese flakes for that one
1 of everything
Shrimp tempura and popcorn shrimp
Yaki mandu sounds good too (fried dumplings)
Fried seaweed, squid, hot dog, fishcake soup
Curry, cheese, and light
4 different flavors of tteokboki here
Brisket,
Cheddar cheese, rosé
Bon appetit
Let's try the brisket first
Look how thick it is
I love it
That's good

The sauce is good too But the rice cake is so soft
Star-shaped flakes
Just fried flakes
Crunchy
Let's dip it
That's cool Look at this
That's delicious
I was worried that they won't taste good together But it's actually great
Dip it again
Yummy
Fried flakes and rice cake
It's new and has a great texture
Tteokboki sauces these days are great
We need to improve
The flakes are very clean
They use fresh oil every morning

Tempura should be good too
But rosé tteokboki first
What's this? Let's try it
What?
-Mashed potatoes -Potatoes!
Mashed potatoes
Let's give this a try
Tasty
What do I do
This one didn't have too much flavor
But this has a strong jalapeño taste
Glass noodles
Should I dip that too?
It looks a little cute, no?
What kind of combination is that?
Good soup

Most tteokboki taste similar
But these are very unique
Thank you That's a big one
Tempura now I've been craving shrimp
Dip it in the sauce
I can taste right away that the frying oil is very clean and fresh
Yaki mandu dipped in rosé sauce
It's packed
Crunchy is the best
What next?
Cheddar cheese This is their new menu
That's something I've never had before
Which one was this again?
No, that's curry
This is jalapeño
I got it mixed up earlier

I said that this tasted like jalapeños
"Strong jalapeño taste"
Now for the real jalapeño
A thick nacho cheese flavor
This one looks like a cream tteokboki
I love cream sauce
So good
Let's dip it in the cheese one
Curry
There's a spoon here
I used the chopsticks on purpose so it lasts
They're different for sure
We use fresh oil every morning just to make our tempura and fried goods special
How many stars do you cook?
I've never counted
4000~5000 for that

Then 10,000+ per day
That's the first thing I do here
It tastes great
-You know 60 Chicken (brand)? -Yes
They made a tteokboki brand And that's Stella Pick
That's cool I've collaborated with 60 Chicken before
That parody
[I was sponsored by many chicken brands]
[No wonder I smell fried chicken]
[Now let the players play]
[Not too many views]
[A past you want to erase]
I hope this one goes well
Please it needs to do well
That was the worst I'm sure it's still there
-We're going to look it up -No no no

Do not look into my past
They said they will contact you again soon
The fried flakes are really special Tteokboki is good too
[To the owner of 60 Chicken...] I apologize...
If this one goes bad too...
I should start begging for views
So good
Pork belly
It's very smokey
-It's brisket -Right, brisket is more expensive
It's brisket Not pork belly
You messed up on the flake flavors too
I thought this was jalapeño
Is this video going to be okay?
Uh oh
This tastes familiar

You know the nacho cheese from the movie theaters
These should go well with beer
Tteokboki and beer?
You can sprinkle these on top of it but it can easily get soggy So it won't be as good
I love that I can continue dipping it So it's crispy
Spicy
This is very cute
Popcorn shrimp
Dip it
It's been sitting here but it's still crispy
I think the curry flakes taste the best
The least expected one
She's really good at eating That's 12 servings
We serve big portions
Where's the food going to?
Quail eggs are great too!

I was going to dip 1 in the flakes but I ate everything
What a bummer
Curry stars are the best
This one is almost done too
Move everything here
Mix it with a spoon
It's still very crunchy
All eyes on me
You're such a good eater
This should get at least 2 million views
We would like to make a bet
[Can't back out on it now]
If you lose, you need to film for us again with our new item
Free food for life if you surpass 1.5 million views
I need to put that in the title I will eat for free if this goes over 1.5m views
-What's in it for you guys? -Just film another one for us if you lose

[A hot dog to finish it off]
So good First time trying it
Sausages
Done
I think you've already earned yourself a free-food-for-life pass form us
Now I know why people watch mukbangs
I ate tteokboki and tempura today
These were very different and delicious
Thanks everyone~
[Gifts for her before she leaves]
Thank you so much These are so cute
[Leaving with a grateful heart...] [Subtitles by Anthony Hyun Choi] [antchoi91@gmail.com]
